name: Steamed Carrots with Basil and Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the carrots and make diagonal slices.
2. Place the fresh basil leaves and rosemary in the bottom of an electric steamer.
3. Put the sliced carrots on top of the herbs.
4. Steam for 15 minutes (until still slightly crunchy).
5. Enjoy the flavorful result.
